title: YG401BIZ Suspended-Account Audit + Stocks/Gold Plan
html:
TL;DR

  • Roll-call audit of Yahir's Facebook Marketplace burner-account fleet (YG401BIZ through YG600BIZ) — most are NO ITEM or SUSPENDED, a few have inventory; the YG-prefix naming convention is the same fleet later referenced in 2020 03 30 facebook pandemic watchlist as the resale arm running parallel to the stock watchlist.
  • Mexican-grocery resell SKUs surface (Del Monterrey 3-chicken-and-cheese flour; Jarritos mandarin/lime/mango 5-pack; Ding Dongs) — the Grants Pass teen Yahir is running tienda-product flips into FB Marketplace alongside Walmart returns.
  • Operating cadence: "2 trips to return shit to Walmart, morning then midday, watch stock videos, get a game plan first the stocks ready and set for the upcoming days" — full pandemic-era hustle stack in one line.
  • Macro thesis bullet at the bottom: "Gold will boom. Focus on stocks then gold. Don't have to call bottom, but have a strategy at certain points." This is 17-year-old Yahir's first explicit position framing — links to value investing and bridge income strategies.
  • Captured March 25, 2020 — eleven days into the COVID lockdown, day after the 9/11 comparison macro note, five days before the full pandemic watchlist. Same brain working both ends — micro arbitrage and macro positioning — at the same time.

Key quotes

"Gold will boom. Focus on stocks then gold. Don't have to call bottom, but have a strategy at certain points."

"2 trips to return shit to Walmart. Morning then midday. Watch stock videos. Get a game plan first the stocks ready and set for the upcoming days."

Open questions

  • How many YG-prefix accounts existed total? The audit jumps from YG401–YG405 to YG500–YG505 to YG600 — suggesting at least three "blocks" of accounts, possibly tied to suspension cycles.
  • Did the gold call pay off? The macro thesis is correct in hindsight (gold ran from ~$1500 to ~$2000 by August 2020) — does any later note confirm whether teen Yahir actually positioned into it?

Connections

fb marketplace · value investing · bridge income strategies · no runway discipline · 2020 03 24 exogenous event 911 · 2020 03 30 facebook pandemic watchlist
